title: Cancellation Policy
description: Seller-declared cancellation terms for a product. Declares the minimum notice period required before cancellation takes effect and the penalty for insufficient notice. Buyers accept these terms by creating a media buy against the product.

notice_period.description: Minimum notice period before cancellation takes effect (e.g., { interval: 30, unit: 'days' }). A guaranteed buy canceled without sufficient notice incurs the declared penalty.

penalty.description: Cancellation penalty applied when the notice period is not met.

type.description: Penalty calculation method. 'percent_remaining': percentage of remaining uncommitted spend. 'full_commitment': buyer owes the full committed budget regardless of delivery. 'fixed_fee': flat monetary amount. 'none': no financial penalty (cancellation with notice is free).

rate.description: Penalty rate as a decimal proportion of remaining committed spend. Required when type is 'percent_remaining' (e.g., 0.5 means 50% of remaining spend).

amount.description: Fixed penalty amount in the buy's currency. Required when type is 'fixed_fee'.
